utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these categories are present. Each section includes sufficient details and costs, as required: (1) health_coverage specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs (€250/month), (2) property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs (€120/month), (3) travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with costs (€70/month), (4) additional_services specifies enhancement services with costs (€30/month), and (5) total_budget presents complete monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes: (1) Health coverage with international physical health coverage including telemedicine and preventive care; (2) Mental health coverage with family therapy and stress management; (3) Property coverage for luxury contents and liability protection; (4) Travel coverage for family international and business travel with emergency coordination; (5) Additional services like concierge, dedicated agent, and priority claims. Mapping these to the ground-truth ratings: For physical health, the described plan matches a premium, global, telemedicine-included plan, consistent with the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' or 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (rating 10). For mental health, family therapy and crisis support correspond to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' or 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (rating 10). For property, luxury contents and enhanced liability match 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' or 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). For travel, global family and business travel protection with emergency coordination align with 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' or 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). For the additional services, concierge, dedicated agent, and priority claims correspond to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10).
